description: This file defines a module for managing data associated with DOM elements in Bootstrap, providing methods to set, get, and remove data tied to elements, primarily used for managing component instances.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Associates a key-value pair (typically an instance) with a DOM element.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the data associated with a specific key for a DOM element.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the data associated with a specific key from a DOM element.
